name: Ravi K.
review: Amazing performance in hilly areas. The Warp mode is addictive. Perfect for daily Hitech city commute.

name: Sita M.
review: Range is great for MVP colony to Gajuwaka runs. Initially had software glitches but last update fixed them.

name: Anil P.
review: Best family car. No issues in heavy monsoon rains. Saving almost 10k monthly on petrol.

name: Arjun S.
review: Perfect for tight parking in Delhi. Turning radius is a life saver. Very budget friendly.

name: Vinod T.
review: Classic look and very sturdy build quality. Service at Pune hub was very professional.
